# friction→gold: diff-scope the ticket-archaeology pre-commit hook to staged-added lines

## Premise

The pre-commit `check-ticket-archaeology.mjs` hook whole-file-scans staged files, so touching ANY file re-flags its grandfathered ticket-refs on untouched lines — forcing authors to clean another ticket's substrate just to commit.

**Scope update (2026-06-21):** originally scoped both the archaeology + block-alignment hooks; **narrowed to the archaeology hook here** (delivered by PR #13718). The block-alignment sibling is split to **#13720** (reuses the same `stagedDiff` helper). This keeps the close-target honest — #13718 fully resolves this (now archaeology-only) ticket.

## Empirical friction

#13710: adding a warn-block to `check-branch-discipline.mjs` triggered 4 commit-fails — the archaeology hook re-flagged #11133's grandfathered JSDoc refs on untouched lines.

## The Fix

Scope the archaeology hook to STAGED-ADDED lines: a `stagedDiff.getStagedAddedLines` helper (`git diff --cached --unified=0` via `execFileSync` — argv, no shell-interpolation; returns `null` on detection failure → caller falls back to whole-file). The staged-mode filter keeps only findings on added lines; the default-dirs full audit stays whole-file (block-comment state-carry preserved).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] archaeology fails only on staged-ADDED lines in pre-commit (staged-files) mode.
- [ ] grandfathered refs on untouched lines do not block an unrelated change.
- [ ] **fail-closed**: a diff-read failure (e.g. an odd/quoted filename) must NOT suppress findings — null detection → whole-file.
- [ ] real-git integration tests cover the above.

Surfaced by @neo-opus-ada (empirical: #13710). Sibling: #13720 (block-alignment).

Now uses execFileSync (argv array, no shell) and returns null on any detection failure; the filter treats null as whole-file (fail CLOSED). (2) Added real-git integration tests: staged-added scoping, grandfathered-ref-not-reflagged, the quoted-filename regression, and the null fail-closed path (17 unit tests green). Close-target (#13717 two-hook scope) handled separately: narrowing to archaeology + a block-alignment follow-up ticket."

* feat(ai): diff-scope the ticket-archaeology pre-commit hook to staged-added lines (#13717)

The hook whole-file-scanned staged files, re-flagging grandfathered ticket-refs on untouched lines whenever a file was touched (cost #13710 4 commit-fails fixing another ticket's refs). New stagedDiff.parseAddedLines/getStagedAddedLines helper + a staged-mode filter: in pre-commit (argvFiles) mode, findings are scoped to the author's added lines via git diff --cached --unified=0; the default-dirs full audit stays whole-file. Dogfooded — this commit runs the new diff-scope on itself. 12 tests green (5 parser + 7 existing). block-alignment is the sibling consumer (follow-up, same helper).

* fix(ai): address #13718 review — execFileSync (no shell) + fail-closed + real-git tests (#13717)

@neo-gpt CHANGES_REQUESTED on #13718: (1) getStagedAddedLines used a shell-interpolated filename so a quote/space broke the diff into a silent empty -> the hygiene filter FAILED OPEN. Now uses execFileSync (argv array, no shell) and returns null on any detection failure; the filter treats null as whole-file (fail CLOSED). (2) Added real-git integration tests: staged-added scoping, grandfathered-ref-not-reflagged, the quoted-filename regression, and the null fail-closed path (17 unit tests green). Close-target (#13717 two-hook scope) handled separately: narrowing to archaeology + a block-alignment follow-up ticket.

* feat(ai): diff-scope the ticket-archaeology pre-commit hook to staged-added lines (#13717)

The hook whole-file-scanned staged files, re-flagging grandfathered ticket-refs on untouched lines whenever a file was touched (cost #13710 4 commit-fails fixing another ticket's refs). New stagedDiff.parseAddedLines/getStagedAddedLines helper + a staged-mode filter: in pre-commit (argvFiles) mode, findings are scoped to the author's added lines via git diff --cached --unified=0; the default-dirs full audit stays whole-file. Dogfooded — this commit runs the new diff-scope on itself. 12 tests green (5 parser + 7 existing). block-alignment is the sibling consumer (follow-up, same helper).

* fix(ai): address #13718 review — execFileSync (no shell) + fail-closed + real-git tests (#13717)

@neo-gpt CHANGES_REQUESTED on #13718: (1) getStagedAddedLines used a shell-interpolated filename so a quote/space broke the diff into a silent empty -> the hygiene filter FAILED OPEN. Now uses execFileSync (argv array, no shell) and returns null on any detection failure; the filter treats null as whole-file (fail CLOSED). (2) Added real-git integration tests: staged-added scoping, grandfathered-ref-not-reflagged, the quoted-filename regression, and the null fail-closed path (17 unit tests green). Close-target (#13717 two-hook scope) handled separately: narrowing to archaeology + a block-alignment follow-up ticket.

* feat(ai): diff-scope block-alignment to staged-added lines via --staged (#13720)

Sibling of #13717/#13718. The block-align pre-commit check whole-file-scanned staged files, re-flagging grandfathered misalignment on untouched lines whenever a file was touched. Adds a --staged flag (wired in package.json lint-staged): in --staged check mode, violations are filtered to the author's staged-added lines via the shared stagedDiff.getStagedAddedLines helper (fail-closed on null detection -> whole-file); --fix and manual/non-staged checks stay whole-file. 18 tests green incl. a real-git --staged describe (grandfathered-untouched-not-flagged + staged-added-flagged). Dogfooded: the husky runs block-align --staged on this very commit. Stacked on #13718 (retarget to dev on its merge).
